propositions: The post-deletion smoke test only proves linkage coverage but is named/scoped as if it verifies every leaf is invocable, and should be renamed/rescoped to reflect stale-import/linkage detection.
The schema-forwarding test only checks the schema is passed as a kwarg and never demonstrates that schema guidance changes a parsed result, so a behavioral schema-guided parse test is needed.

A new test should pin that parse_structured coerces payload '{"count": "3"}' to count=3 (int) while tolerant_parse with no schema returns {"count": "3"} (string), as a deterministic library-independent difference.
The baseline test test_capture_baseline_not_implemented_error_not_raised only asserts is-not-None and duplicates stronger neighboring baseline tests, so it should be deleted or folded in.
Lint, typecheck, and test targets must all pass after the cleanup.
